# Geopacks

> Geopacks is a food-grade PET packaging manufacturer based in Poolankinar, Pollachi, Tamil Nadu, India, producing PET bottles, jars, caps, and preforms since 2014 for packaged water, juice, edible oil, and dairy brands.

## Company
- Name: Geopacks
- Founded: 2014
- Location: Pollachi - Udumalpet Road, Poolankinar, Tamil Nadu, India
- Phone: +91 9751546565
- Email: geopacks2015@gmail.com
- Hours: Monday to Saturday, 9:00 AM - 5:00 PM

## Products
- PET Bottles: 16 variants from 200 ml to 2 litre — water, juice, edible oil, and liquor bottles. Weights from 10 g to 48 g, neck sizes 25-28 mm.
- PET Jars: round jars (100 ml, 250 ml) and square jars (250 ml, 1000 ml), neck sizes 38-83 mm.
- PET Preforms: 27 specifications across Water (Alaska 13-110 g), Juice & CSD (short/long neck), ROPP (14-56 g), and Jar preforms (11-66 g). Neck diameters 25-100 mm.
- Caps & Closures: tamper-proof caps in multiple sizes and colors.
- Custom Designs: bespoke bottle shapes tailored to brand and filling line.
- Printing Services: screen and offset printing for branding.

## Industries Served
Packaged Drinking Water, Juice & Beverages, Edible Oil, Dairy & Ghee, Food Products.

## Why Geopacks
- 10+ years of manufacturing experience
- 100% food-grade PET materials
- Consistent quality across batches
- Custom design and molding capability
- Reliable, on-time delivery

## Contact
For quotes, email geopacks2015@gmail.com or WhatsApp +91 9751546565 with product type, capacity, quantity, and delivery location.
